message:
fix(codegen): Sanitize variable names with dots and .* suffix in declarations

- Replace dots with underscores in capture struct variable names
  (e.g., __cap_foo.bar -> __cap_foo_bar) for declarations in for_basic.zig
  and value_generation.zig
- Skip hoisting for variables already passed as pointer params in
  try_except.zig (prevents redeclaration errors in nested try blocks)
- Strip .* suffix when hoisting declarations (pointer access vs declaration)

These fixes resolve compilation errors in exception handling tests where
generated variable names contained invalid characters for Zig identifiers.
test_exception_variations.py now passes all 90 tests.
